children.name: Mid-build, the architecture was wrong. So I changed it.

text.content: Mid-build, the architecture was wrong. So I changed it.

children.name: The original plan: scan a QR, resolve the merchant, fire a real-time transfer straight from the payer's linked bank. Validation proved that bet couldn't hold.

text.content: The original plan: scan a QR, resolve the merchant, fire a real-time transfer straight from the payer's linked bank. Validation proved that bet couldn't hold.

children.name: Providers like Mono DirectPay handle account linking, authorization, and payment initiation — but not persistent, real-time orchestration across multiple banks. Every payment would have inherited bank uptime, latency, high fees, and redirects.

text.content: Providers like Mono DirectPay handle account linking, authorization, and payment initiation — but not persistent, real-time orchestration across multiple banks. Every payment would have inherited bank uptime, latency, high fees, and redirects.

children.name: Separate the two flows that were wrongly fused: funding ≠ checkout. Banks are touched when a user funds their wallet — not on every scan. Payments execute against wallet balance. For a high volume transaction startup, this architecture fits perfectly.

text.content: Separate the two flows that were wrongly fused: funding ≠ checkout. Banks are touched when a user funds their wallet — not on every scan. Payments execute against wallet balance. For a high volume transaction startup, this architecture fits perfectly.

children.name: Holding balances raises the bar — naming the costs is part of owning the decision.

text.content: Holding balances raises the bar — naming the costs is part of owning the decision.

children.name: Storing value pulls in a sponsor-bank partnership and stronger compliance controls.

text.content: Storing value pulls in a sponsor-bank partnership and stronger compliance controls.

children.name: Users now trust Shappay with balances — raising the bar on security and withdrawals.

text.content: Users now trust Shappay with balances — raising the bar on security and withdrawals.

children.name: Internal balance tracking, ledger consistency, and failed-transfer recovery.

text.content: Internal balance tracking, ledger consistency, and failed-transfer recovery.

children.name: Liquidity movement, settlement timing, reversals, and reconciliation.

text.content: Liquidity movement, settlement timing, reversals, and reconciliation.
